---
title: "Obesity Level Predictive Modeling"
author: "Kaylen Ton"
---

### Load in the data

```{r - packages and data}

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(vip)

# For parallel processing when it comes to tuning multiple models (which can take longer)
library(parallelly)
library(future)
cores <- availableCores(logical = F)
plan(multisession, workers = cores)

```

### Cleaning the data

- Rounding different variables by different decimal places
- Remove un-interpretable variable: HVAC (?)

```{r}

mydata <- read_csv("ObesityData.csv")

cleaned_data <- mydata %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>% 
  mutate(Age = round(Age, 0))

```

### EDA

```{r}

cleaned_data %>% 
  select_if(is.numeric) %>% 
  cor()

# The highest correlations between variables stays under |.50|
# Weight & Height -> 0.46226361 correlation

```

# **Modeling**

## Splitting Data

```{r}

set.seed(73)

split <- initial_split(cleaned_data, strata = NObeyesdad)

obesity_train <- training(split)
obesity_test <- testing(split)

```

# Model 1 - Base Decision Tree

```{r}

base_tree_model <- decision_tree() %>% 
  set_engine('rpart') %>% 
  set_mode('classification')

tree_recipe <- recipe(NObeyesdad ~ ., data = obesity_train) %>%
  step_novel(all_nominal_predictors(), new_level = "other") %>% 
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

tree_workflow <- workflow() %>% 
  add_model(base_tree_model) %>% 
  add_recipe(tree_recipe)

base_tree_fit <- tree_workflow %>% 
  last_fit(split = split)
    
base_tree_fit %>% 
  collect_metrics()

# Base decision tree model results
  # accuracy	    multiclass	  0.8433962		
  # roc_auc	      hand_till 	  0.9654471		
  # brier_class	  multiclass	  0.1244353	

```

# Model 2 - Tree Model w/ Tuned Hyper-Parameters

```{r}

tune_tree_model <- decision_tree(
  cost_complexity = tune(),
  tree_depth = tune(),
  min_n = tune()
  ) %>% 
  set_engine('rpart') %>% 
  set_mode('classification')

# Cross Validation and Hyper-parameter Tuning
tree_folds <- vfold_cv(obesity_train, v = 10,
                       strata = NObeyesdad)
    
# Configure custom metrics
tree_metrics <- metric_set(roc_auc, sens, spec)
    
# Fit resamples
tree_fit_resample <- tree_workflow %>% 
  fit_resamples(resamples = tree_folds, 
                metrics = tree_metrics)
    
tree_fit_rs_result <- tree_fit_resample %>% 
  collect_metrics(summarize = F)

tree_fit_rs_result %>%
  group_by(.metric) %>%
  summarize(min = min(.estimate),
            median = median(.estimate),
            max = max(.estimate))

# 10 fold estimates
#   .metric     min   median      max
# 1 roc_auc   0.958   0.976     0.984
# 2 sens      0.813   0.871     0.924
# 3 spec      0.969   0.979     0.988

tree_grid <- grid_random(extract_parameter_set_dials(tune_tree_model), size = 5)

tree_workflow <- tree_workflow %>%
  update_model(tune_tree_model)

tuning_tree_results <- tree_workflow %>% 
  tune_grid(resamples = tree_folds,
            grid = tree_grid,
            metrics = tree_metrics)

tuning_tree_results %>% 
  collect_metrics(summarize = FALSE) %>% 
  filter(.metric == "roc_auc") %>% 
  group_by(id) %>% 
  summarize(min_roc_auc = min(.estimate),
            median_roc_auc = median(.estimate),
            max_roc_auc = max(.estimate))

autoplot(tuning_tree_results)

tuning_tree_results %>% 
  show_best(metric = 'roc_auc', n = 5)

best_tune_tree_model <- tuning_tree_results %>% 
  select_best(metric = 'roc_auc')

final_tune_tree_workflow <- tree_workflow %>% 
  finalize_workflow(best_tune_tree_model)

final_tune_tree_fit <- final_tune_tree_workflow %>% 
  last_fit(split = split)

final_tune_tree_fit %>% 
  collect_metrics()

# Tuned decision  tree model     results
  # accuracy	    multiclass	  0.90000000	
  # roc_auc	      hand_till	    0.98130472	
  # brier_class	  multiclass	  0.08573253	

```

# Model 3 - Boosted ?

```{r}



```
